history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me to the right is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. I should turn to face a safe direction, and turning right will face me downward toward an open floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the upper-left interior cell facing down. Moving forward leads to a safe floor cell and brings me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava to my right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 2 facing down. The cell directly ahead is open floor, while the lava is to my right and the goal is further down-right. Moving forward is a safe step that brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom-left open cell facing down, with a wall directly ahead. The goal is to my right on the same row, so I should turn to face right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right toward an empty path, and the goal is directly to the right after one empty cell. Moving forward advances safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the goal is directly one cell ahead of me, with no wall or lava in between. Moving forward will reach the goal immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
